name: Aveva Group plc
lede: Aveva runs three centers across three Indian cities. Hyderabad, Mumbai and Bengaluru, covering R&D and CoE, built over 25 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Aveva office in India. We map three, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Aveva Group plc GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Aveva runs 3 verified centers across 3 Indian cities (Hyderabad, Mumbai, Bengaluru), covering R&D and CoE. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

titles.title: Vice President and Head of Finance - Asia Pacific

about.description: Aveva's India footprint covers Hyderabad, Mumbai and Bengaluru, spanning R&D and CoE. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 21 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Aveva operate in India?
faq.a: Aveva operates 3 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Aveva have centers in?
faq.a: Aveva's India footprint includes Hyderabad and 2 additional cities.

faq.q: What types of centers does Aveva run in India?
faq.a: Aveva runs R&D and 1 additional center type in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Aveva's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Aveva's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Aveva's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Aveva's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
